title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 and discusses harness engineering, AI loops, and their applications in regulated industries. The video explores tensions between open and closed source AI models, risks of model shutdowns, and the state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on experience since 2023 in the space.
writeup: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 alongside harness engineering and AI loops, framing how these techniques apply to regulated industries. The discussion weighs tensions between open and closed source foundation models, the risk of model shutdowns, and the current state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on the channel's experience in the space since 2023. Core concepts include multi-agent systems, prompt engineering, and AI loops.
